name: gulf-of-mannar-demo
description: Act 2 scripted story, tuned for the risk engine (P0). KADAL SELVI is the protagonist: it crosses into the Marine National Park (ZONE, +30), teleports once (SPOOF, +15), then goes dark repeatedly near the park (DARK, +15 then +10 each). Its risk score climbs LOW to ELEVATED to HIGH (fires ILLEGAL_FISHING_SUSPECTED) to CRITICAL (fires BOARDING_RECOMMENDED with intercepts). Watch the evidence accumulate. 'speed' compresses playback wall-clock 60x; frame t_ms are event times, so implied speeds are honest and only the intended teleport trips the spoof check. KADAL SELVI moves at 25kn (2s expected interval), so the 6x dark threshold is ~12s of silence, letting several dark episodes land inside the demo window. MEEN RANI (single zone violation) and GHOST (single spoof) stay LOW as background. Non-protagonist vessels anchor (speed <= 1kn) so only KADAL SELVI goes dark.
